## Add Tool: <!-- tool name here -->

### Checklist

- [ ] The tool is open-source (source code publicly available).
- [ ] The tool is relevant to analog, mixed-signal, or RF design.
- [ ] I have verified the tool is **not already** in `data/tools.json`.
- [ ] I have followed the [tool schema](../CONTRIBUTING.md#tool-schema) exactly.
- [ ] The `id` field is unique and uses lowercase kebab-case.
- [ ] The `description` is accurate, 1–2 sentences, plain text.
- [ ] The `license` field uses a valid [SPDX identifier](https://spdx.org/licenses/).

### Tool entry added

```json
{
  "id":          "",
  "name":        "",
  "description": "",
  "url":         "",
  "website":     "",
  "category":    "",
  "tags":        [],
  "license":     "",
  "stars":       0,
  "owner":       ""
}
```
